title: Deduplicate repeated comic text and apply comic-inspired UI theme

requirements.summary: Deduplicate repeated dialogue/panel lines before rendering/exporting comic content (including credits panels) while preserving order.
acceptanceCriteria: If the same exact line appears multiple times in the input script, only the first occurrence is kept in the final output.
If the same exact line appears consecutively (back-to-back), the final output contains only one instance.
Deduplication preserves the original ordering of the remaining lines.
Deduplication is applied consistently to both the main scene panels and the credits panels (if credits are generated from a list of lines).

file_operations.description: Implement a frontend deduplication utility that applies the exact-line rules (keep first occurrence; preserve order) and can be used for both scene panels and credits lines.

Add a React hook that, when enabled, uses the backend capability available on the actor (deduplicateComicText) to produce deduplicated text lines, falling back to the local utility when the actor is unavailable; expose a single, reusable API for scene and credits text preparation.

Wire the deduplication step into the comic generation/render/export flow by ensuring all text line lists (scene panels and credits panels) pass through the shared deduplication hook/utility before display and any export preparation.

requirements.summary: Expose an English user-facing indication (label and optional toggle) that repetition removal is active, and ensure the rendered panels reflect the active setting.
acceptanceCriteria: The UI contains an English label indicating repetition removal (and if configurable, an English toggle).
When repetition removal is enabled, the rendered list of panels in the UI does not display duplicate lines per the deduplication rules.

file_operations.description: Create a small control component with an English label (and toggle) for repetition removal; compose shadcn-ui components (e.g., Switch/Label) to present the control. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Add a lightweight settings context/state container for the repetition removal enabled flag so multiple parts of the UI (preview list, credits preview, export preparation) can read the same setting.

Integrate the repetition removal control into the existing UI and connect its enabled state to the deduplication step so the on-screen rendered panels update accordingly; ensure any user-facing copy added here is English.

requirements.summary: Apply a consistent comic-inspired visual theme across the app (bold typography, high-contrast palette, panel styling) while avoiding blue/purple as primary colors.
acceptanceCriteria: The app uses a consistent comic-inspired theme (e.g., bold headings, high-contrast palette, panel-like containers) across all screens/components.
The theme avoids blue/purple as the primary palette unless explicitly requested later.

file_operations.description: Define global theme tokens and base styles to support a comic-inspired look (e.g., warm high-contrast palette, bold headings, thicker borders, panel-like containers) without using blue/purple as primary; keep changes centralized here.

Extend Tailwind theme configuration to support the comic-inspired palette/typography tokens used across the UI (keeping blue/purple out of the primary role) and enable consistent panel styling utilities.

Create a reusable ComicPanel wrapper that applies consistent panel styling (border, background, spacing, typography) and composes existing shadcn-ui primitives as needed (do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui). Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Use the shared ComicPanel wrapper (and theme classes/tokens) throughout the app UI so panel styling, spacing, and typography remain consistent on all screens/components rendered by the app.
